info.title: Shipwright Admin API
info.description: REST API for the Shipwright admin service — CRUD for agents, env vars, cron jobs, tokens, tools, and plugins, plus the agent runtime polling endpoints.

modelBreakdown.description: Per-model token breakdown for this run

200.description: Agent provisioned (or already-provisioned — idempotent), or skipped for self-hosted agents
List of cron jobs with run summary

404.description: Run not found or not owned by agent

200.description: Aggregated cron-run token stats across all agents
Aggregated chat token daily stats across all agents
Updated daily chat token usage rows (one per model)
